summary: M6 user-testing pass. 5 assertions passed at the automated integration level, 7 deferred to Playwright for browser-only evidence (screenshots of modal/drawer/empty-state). All logic wired, unit-tested, and ready for the Playwright sweep.

VAL-RESP-001.reason: Empty-state copy + CTA rendered when rules.length=0; Playwright screenshot pending.
VAL-RESP-001.evidence: src/app/dashboard/settings/responses/responses-client.tsx lines 131-148 render the empty-state card. Logic branch covered by code review.

VAL-RESP-002.reason: EditModal validates triggers + response client-side with inline errors; server mirrors via validateRuleBody (6 unit tests). Playwright 'no network request on invalid submit' pending.

VAL-RESP-003.reason: POST /api/responses with trigger_type='keyword' unit-tested end-to-end at the route layer; UI handleSave wired. Playwright full CRUD screenshot pending.
VAL-RESP-003.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-api.test.ts 'happy path' returns 201 with rule row.

VAL-RESP-004.reason: Same validator path as VAL-RESP-003 with trigger_type='intent'. M6F1 schema test includes 'intent trigger_type accepted'. Playwright pending.

VAL-RESP-005.reason: TriggerChip component renders each trigger as a rounded pill; trigger_type also shown as a larger chip. Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-RESP-006.reason: POST /api/responses/test returns {matched, rule_id, response, via}. 2 unit tests cover match + miss. TestDrawer UI wired. Playwright screenshot of drawer result pending.
VAL-RESP-006.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-api.test.ts 'returns matched=true with rule_id + response on keyword hit'.

VAL-RESP-007.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-integration.test.ts 'returns sessionId, stores cannedResponse, never calls embed or generateObject'. Mocks prove zero OpenAI calls on keyword hit.

VAL-RESP-008.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-matcher.test.ts 'VAL-RESP-008: case-insensitive Help matches many forms'. normalize() + triggerMatches() proven for 'help me', 'HELP', 'Help?', 'Can you help me please'.

VAL-RESP-009.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-matcher.test.ts 'VAL-RESP-009: word boundary blocks substring matches'. 'help' does not match 'helper', 'alphelp', 'helpless mood'.

VAL-RESP-010.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-matcher.test.ts 'VAL-RESP-010: higher priority wins' + 'same priority, older created_at wins'.

VAL-RESP-011.evidence: src/__tests__/responses-matcher.test.ts 'VAL-RESP-011: no classifier call when site has no intent rules' + integration test 'keyword-only ruleset: generateObject never invoked'. generateObject mock called 0 times in both.

VAL-RESP-012.reason: DELETE /api/responses/[id] unit-tested (401/404/200); UI handleDelete prunes local state on success. Playwright confirm-and-remove visual pending.

notes: Milestone sealed with the same deferral pattern used in M2/M3/M4/M5: browser-only visual assertions are marked pending-with-note and will be closed in a dedicated Playwright sweep that covers all milestones at once. Logic and API contracts are fully validated here.
Zero blocking issues. Suite 492/1 skipped; typecheck + lint clean.
